creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 219466
Patch for libfmt

Update to 7.1.2
Add option to use full cache table in dagonbox

References: 
https://github.com/fmtlib/fmt/releases/tag/7.1.0
https://github.com/jk-jeon/dragonbox#cache-policy

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #0 r364979 (amd64) (make + make check-plist + make test)
Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64)
